title: heuchera hartwegii
intro: Heuchera hartwegii, also known as the Coral Bells, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Heuchera hartwegii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
